label: Report Generator
description: Generates a structured drug discovery report for RPS6KB1 candidates, summarizing target mapping, docking scores, ADMET profiles, and recommended compounds for further validation.

defaultInputs.name: Bioactivity Results
defaultInputs.tooltip: Output from the Bioactivity Filter step — ranked compound list with IC50 and binding scores.

defaultInputs.name: Docking Results
defaultInputs.tooltip: Optional raw docking data including ΔG values and docked structures.

defaultOutputs.name: Report URL
defaultOutputs.description: Download link to the generated PDF/CSV report.

defaultOutputs.name: Executive Summary
defaultOutputs.description: AI-generated narrative summary of the drug discovery findings.
